title: Shorten IdentifierDisplay truncation length
description:
As a dashboard user, I want long identifier values to truncate sooner so that card layouts stay compact and readable.

Feature: IdentifierDisplay value truncation

Scenario: Long identifier values truncate at a shorter length
  Given an identifier value exceeds the truncation threshold
  When IdentifierDisplay renders the value
  Then the value is truncated earlier than before with an ellipsis

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting fix. Plan: reduce truncation length in IdentifierDisplay and update tests.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Done. Reduced identifier truncation length to 18 chars and updated truncation test. Tests: 
> aws-amplify-gen2@0.1.0 test
> jest identifier-display.test.tsx

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Adjusting truncation length to 12 as requested; will update code and tests, then re-run identifier-display tests.
